name: The internal ID of the item. Used in code and HJSON references. No spaces allowed.
displayName: The name shown to players in-game.
description: Short description shown in the item info panel. Supports color tags like [#ff0000]red[].
details: Extended description shown when the player clicks for more info.
color: The color of the item displayed in-game, in hex format.
hardness: How hard this item is to mine. Higher values require better drills.
cost: Base material cost. Affects how long buildings that use this item take to construct.
explosiveness: How explosive this item is. High values cause explosions when the item burns.
flammability: How flammable this item is. Values above 0.3 make it eligible for item burners.
radioactivity: How radioactive this item is. Affects nearby units and buildings.
charge: How electrically potent this item is.
healthScaling: Multiplies the default health of buildings that require this item.
frames: If greater than 0, this item is animated with this many frames.
transitionFrames: Number of generated transition frames between each animation frame.
lowPriority: If enabled, drills will only mine this item when nothing else is available.
buildable: If disabled, this item cannot be used in building construction and will be incinerated in cores.
hidden: If enabled, this item is hidden from the player.
research: The ID of the item or block that must be researched before this item unlocks.
